description_long: This is a tall, slender plastic bottle filled with orange-colored juice, featuring a contoured shape for easy grip. The bottle is sealed with a gray screw cap and is wrapped with a printed label that displays branding, product information, and vibrant fruit illustrations. The label includes a prominent depiction of orange slices, suggesting the juice flavor, and contains a nutritional information panel on one side. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall design is practical for single-serving use and is commonly found in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or carried by pedestrians.
description: A tall, contoured plastic bottle of orange juice with a gray screw cap, fruit illustrations, and a glossy label.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle shows the nutritional information panel and barcode on the label.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main brand label and product name prominently.
description_view_2: This side highlights a large orange slice illustration and part of the product branding.
description_view_3: This view shows another orange slice illustration and additional product information text.
